name: Indu Aggarwal
bio: Indu left her lucrative corporate career to follow her passion for making a difference. She leads Disha for Success and Disha for India to build a healthy, happy, and wealthy society.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya leads program design and implementation across all target states. She specializes in creating scalable educational modules.

name: Amit Patel
bio: Amit oversees the logistical and financial framework of Disha, ensuring that resources hit the ground exactly where they are needed.

name: Neha Gupta
bio: Neha manages our network of over 5,000 volunteers, bridging the gap between urban mentors and rural beneficiaries.

name: Vikram Singh
bio: Vikram brings corporate sponsors and foundational grants to Disha, ensuring sustainable funding for all long-term initiatives.

name: Ananya Desai
bio: Ananya spends 80% of her time in rural districts, ensuring that our healthcare camps and learning centers are running smoothly.
